hero.headline: From Moment to Masterpiece
hero.subheadline: The Poem Booth transforms your picture into poems and artworks styled by writers and artists

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to create your unique artwork

step1.title: Press & Pose
step1.description: Hit the button, watch the countdown and pose for your best shot

step2.title: Get your Art
step2.description: Your picture is securely transformed into a portrait or poem by our selected AI models

step3.title: Share
step3.description: Share your generated portrait or poem with the world

portrait.title: The Portrait Edition
portrait.subtitle: Take a picture and 30 seconds later get your personal masterpiece

original.title: The Original Edition
original.subtitle: Take a picture and 10 seconds later get your personal poem

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: See the Poem Booth in action at events around the world

practicalities.subtitle: Everything you need to know about setting up the Poem Booth

booking.title: Booking & Rates
booking.subtitle: Pricing from our {hub} hub
booking.footnote: Prices exclude applicable taxes. Custom packages available.

transport.title: Transport rate
transport.note: (two way for 1 day event, 4 way for multiple days)

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Add your logo / product in saved / printed artworks

customization.description: Customize style of poem or portrait based on style or input

otherRegions.title: Outside US/EU?
otherRegions.description: We're expanding globally. Contact us for availability in your region.
otherRegions.emailBody:
Hello,

I'm interested in booking the Poem Booth for an event outside the US/EU.

Please let me know about availability in my region.

Thank you!

footer.vouwDescription: VOUW is a design studio from Amsterdam, The Netherlands that works at the crossroads of design and technology.
footer.distributorTitle: Interested in distributing Poem Booth in your country or region as a licensed company?
footer.trademark: Poem Booth® is a registered trademark and protected brand.
